summary: Set 056 Session 3 (3 of 3, FINAL) - Complete centralization + close. The substantive complete-centralization pass that executes the consolidated S2 punch-list (s2-validation.md s5) and closes the set. (1) Consumer-table keep-vs-remove DECISION routed through cross-provider consensus (gemini-2.5-pro, independent of this orchestrator, $0.003793) which returned Option B (pointer-only), high confidence: dropped the ## Consumer repos table from all three engine files in favor of the existing ## Shared repo facts pointer into docs/repository-reference.md -> Documentation authority and release status. Converges with the operator 'complete centralization, period' directive and the S2 verifier; makes punch-list item 4 (header drift) moot since the drifted table is removed not realigned. Full trail: s3-consensus.md. (2) Relocated the one genuinely sole-sourced engine-file fact - the router-config-editor walkthrough - into a new src/configEditor/ row in repository-reference.md's extension file map (command + 3 YAML files + key source files). Every other inline-only CLAUDE.md fact already had an engine-agnostic home and was thinned to a pointer: orchestrator-block contract -> session-state-schema.md + ai-led-session-workflow.md; build/test/e2e-harness/CI -> CONTRIBUTING.md; session-state schema -> session-state-schema.md. (3) Fixed the two S2 stragglers: Finding A repository-reference.md:475 CLAUDE.md file-map row now says shared facts live in docs/repository-reference.md (aligned with sibling rows); Finding B CONTRIBUTING.md:9 now cites CLAUDE.md only for role+portability and repository-reference.md for the canonical consumer map / release status. (4) Symmetrized CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/GEMINI.md to a byte-identical shared body (## Quick start -> ## Decision-time consensus; sha256 37242fe0..., 144 lines each, diff IDENTICAL) differing only in the H1+audience header and a single final ## Engine-specific bootstrap section (Claude Code inherits Windows User env; Codex/Copilot and Gemini carry the explicit key-export snippet); upgraded the prose Shared repo facts pointers to clickable anchor links (item 6). CLAUDE.md 231->160 lines, net -51 lines across the change with no shared fact lost. Validation (item 7): structural diff byte-identical; straggler re-grep zero live engine-file-as-canonical references (the lone implementation-summary-023-027.md CLAUDE.md mention is a historical Documentation-Updates summary, S2-dispositioned out-of-scope, deliberately left untouched); anchor target exists and all three engine files link it; code fences balanced; table rows well-formed. Cross-provider verification by gemini-2.5-pro (a different provider; fed the actual edited files AND the locked S1 contract s1-audit-record.md this time, closing the S2 context gap) returned VERIFIED ($0.041726): all five claim checks held; sole_sourced_facts [], lost_facts [], new_stragglers [] all empty; verifier endorsed the consumer-table removal as 'a sound tightening of the original contract.' No critical/important/nice-to-have findings; nothing to disposition. Authoritative record: s3-validation.md; decision trail: s3-consensus.md; verification: s3-verification.md. Net S3 verdict VERIFIED. No code, no release (documentation authority only). FINAL session - set flips to complete.

reason.specifics: Final session of Set 056 - the set is complete and flips to complete on this close; there is no next session. Engine attribution is carried forward only to satisfy the disposition schema.
